hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*\b(origin|upstream)\s+main\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main. Use a PR instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd /home/maber/Documents/GitHub/agent-dev/dev-suite && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi
